goal: Align sitemap, page canonicals, and JS-rebuilt canonicals on extensionless URLs so the 9 .html-form URLs Cloudflare Pages already 308-redirects are no longer advertised in the sitemap or self-declared as canonical
done: Stripped .html from 9 sitemap <loc> entries (features, th/features, question-draw, th/question-draw, and 5 suit pages: cups/major/pentacles/swords/wands). Stripped .html from canonical + hreflang attrs in features.html, th/features.html, and the 5 suit pages (kept the hreflang=th-TH ?category= query-param form on suit pages — it has no .html). Updated SUIT_COPY.{major,wands,cups,swords,pentacles}.path in js/suit-page.js so the JS-rebuilt canonical/og:url at runtime also drop .html. question-draw.html and th/question-draw.html have no canonical/hreflang tags so only their sitemap loc needed cleaning
root_cause: Tracker flagged 156/197 sitemap URLs as 404. Investigation showed sitemap was healthy (175 entries, all 200 on production), but 9 entries used .html-form URLs that Cloudflare Pages 308-redirects to clean URLs. Sitemap should advertise final canonical URLs, not URLs that redirect. Concurrent issue: page <link rel=canonical> and js/suit-page.js SUIT_COPY.path strings still declared .html as canonical, creating a contradiction with Cloudflare's actual 308 behavior
fix: 37-line bundle: 9 sitemap loc substitutions + 16 HTML canonical/hreflang line changes across 7 files + 5 SUIT_COPY path string changes in js/suit-page.js. All 9 source URLs verified present pre-edit. All 5 post-edit verifications pass
verified: canonical-with-.html in each of 8 edited HTML files returned 0
SUIT_COPY path entries in js/suit-page.js are all extensionless
live HEAD checks: extensionless URLs return 200 on production, .html forms 308 to clean URLs
notes: Tracker's '156/197 returning 404' claim was stale — live spot-checks during diagnosis showed 13/13 sample URLs returning 200, and the 9 URLs in this patch were the only .html-form locs in the sitemap. Tracker also misattributed the URL tree (claimed sitemap pointed at /tarot-card-meanings/[slug]-tarot-meaning/; actual sitemap points at /cards/[slug]/). Original user request was sitemap-only; halt-and-flag surfaced the page canonical / SUIT_COPY drift, user expanded scope to bundle all three layers into one commit. features.html and th/features.html are noindex,follow so the canonical update is hygiene rather than indexability impact, but keeps the page/sitemap/HTTP triad consistent. Pre-existing larger SEO backlog (TH suit-page parity gap, /tarot-card-meanings/[slug]-tarot-meaning/ legacy stub tree, cardMeaningSchema empty pre-render, BreadcrumbList missing on meanings indexes, reading.html noindex, stray nested tarot-card-meanings/th/ dir) is unchanged by this patch.
